items.title_en: Two bodies of missing Italians recovered from inside Maldives cave
items.title_zh: 马尔代夫洞穴内发现两具失踪意大利人尸体
items.desc_en: The two were among four divers located in the furthest chamber in the cave and their bodies were recovered by specialist divers.
items.desc_zh: 这两人是位于洞穴最远房间的四名潜水员之一，他们的尸体被专业潜水员发现。

items.title_en: Home Depot says core shopper is resilient in the face of higher gas prices, sales rise 5%
items.title_zh: 家得宝 (Home Depot) 表示核心购物者面对汽油价格上涨具有弹性，销售额增长 5%
items.desc_en: Home Depot beat Wall Street's expectations on the top and bottom lines, even as some shoppers pulled back on larger projects.
items.desc_zh: 尽管一些买家撤回了大型项目，但家得宝的营收和利润超出了华尔街的预期。

items.title_en: Nvidia earnings expectations are high. Why HSBC expects the chipmaker to clear the bar
items.title_zh: 英伟达的盈利预期很高。为什么汇丰银行期望芯片制造商能够清除障碍
items.desc_en: HSBC not only expects a strong quarterly report from Nvidia. It expects even stronger guidance from the chipmaker.
items.desc_zh: 汇丰银行不仅预计英伟达将发布强劲的季度报告。它预计芯片制造商将提供更强有力的指导。

items.title_en: Long Island Rail Road to resume operations as deal reached to end strike
items.title_zh: 结束罢工协议达成后，长岛铁路将恢复运营
items.desc_en: The Long Island Rail Road is set to resume rolling on Tuesday after a deal was reached to end a strike that had shut down the commuter rail system.
items.desc_zh: 在达成协议结束导致通勤铁路系统关闭的罢工后，长岛铁路将于周二恢复运营。

items.title_en: Ebola may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织医生警告说，埃博拉病毒的传播速度可能比最初想象的要快
items.desc_en: Hundreds of cases are suspected in central Africa but experts fear the actual number may be much higher.
items.desc_zh: 中部非洲疑似有数百起病例，但专家担心实际数字可能要高得多。

items.title_en: Japan, China lead foreign government retreat from U.S. Treasurys as Gulf War fallout stokes currency fears
items.title_zh: 海湾战争后果引发货币担忧，日本和中国引领外国政府撤出美国国债
items.desc_en: The selloff came as the outbreak of the U.S.-Iran conflict and resulting surge in crude oil prices sent the Japanese yen and other Asian currencies tumbling.
items.desc_zh: 此次抛售发生之际，美伊冲突爆发，原油价格飙升，导致日元和其他亚洲货币暴跌。

items.title_en: 2026 CNBC Disruptor 50: See the full list of companies, rankings, and a new leader in the AI race
items.title_zh: 2026 年 CNBC Disruptor 50：查看 AI 竞赛的完整公司名单、排名和新领导者
items.desc_en: CNBC reveals the 2026 Disruptor 50 list led by an increasingly powerful and highly valued group of AI companies.
items.desc_zh: CNBC 公布了 2026 年颠覆者 50 强名单，由一群日益强大和高价值的人工智能公司领衔。

items.title_en: Anthropic and U.S. government to face off in DC court over blacklisting of AI company
items.title_zh: Anthropic 和美国政府将在华盛顿法院就人工智能公司列入黑名单展开对峙
items.desc_en: Anthropic sued the Defense Department in March after the agency declared the artificial intelligence startup a supply chain risk.
items.desc_zh: 今年三月，在国防部宣布这家人工智能初创公司存在供应链风险后，Anthropic 起诉了国防部。

items.title_en: 2026 CNBC Disruptor 50 list: Why Anthropic was No. 1 in this year's rankings
items.title_zh: 2026 年 CNBC Disruptor 50 榜单：为何 Anthropic 在今年排名第一
items.desc_en: Anthropic, posting explosive growth for its powerful AI systems that enterprises trust, has leapfrogged OpenAI on the CNBC Disruptor 50 list as the new No. 1.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic 凭借其深受企业信赖的强大人工智能系统实现了爆炸性增长，在 CNBC Disruptor 50 榜单上超越 OpenAI，成为新的第一名。

items.title_en: Jackson Pollock painting sells for record $181m at auction
items.title_zh: 杰克逊·波洛克 (Jackson Pollock) 画作在拍卖会上以创纪录的 1.81 亿美元成交
items.desc_en: The Abstract Expressionist's Number 7A, 1948 painting is now his most expensive artwork ever sold at auction.
items.desc_zh: 这位抽象表现主义画家 1948 年的 7A 号画作现在是他在拍卖会上售出的最昂贵的艺术品。

items.title_en: Cuba condemns U.S. sanctions, accuses Washington of building ‘fraudulent case’ for military action
items.title_zh: 古巴谴责美国制裁，指责华盛顿为军事行动制造“欺诈案件”
items.desc_en: The comments come after a fresh wave of U.S. sanctions and amid mounting speculation that the U.S. could carry out military strikes against Cuba.
items.desc_zh: 这一言论是在美国实施新一波制裁之后发表的，而且人们越来越猜测美国可能对古巴进行军事打击。

items.desc_en: Police say a 25-year-old man is suspected of killing his parents and injuring four others in southern Spain.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，一名 25 岁男子涉嫌在西班牙南部杀害了他的父母并打伤了另外四人。

items.desc_zh: 尽管权力不平衡，这种关系仍然持续存在，双方都认识到这种关系太重要了，不能失败。

items.desc_en: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克输给 OpenAI 是一系列法庭失败中的最新一起。

items.title_en: Elon Musk loses court battle against Sam Altman and OpenAI after 3-week trial
items.title_zh: 经过三周的审判后，埃隆·马斯克在与萨姆·奥尔特曼和 OpenAI 的法庭诉讼中败诉
items.desc_en: The jury ruled in favor of Sam Altman and OpenAI in their dramatic court battle with Elon Musk.
items.desc_zh: 在 Sam Altman 和 OpenAI 与埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 激烈的法庭斗争中，陪审团做出了有利于他们的裁决。

items.title_en: Jury tosses Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and its boss Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 陪审团驳回埃隆·马斯克对 OpenAI 及其老板萨姆·奥尔特曼的诉讼
items.desc_en: Jurors spent nearly a month hearing and viewing evidence in the high-profile trial, where Musk had accused Altman of "stealing a charity".
items.desc_zh: 陪审员们花了近一个月的时间在这场备受瞩目的审判中听取和查看证据，马斯克在审判中指控奥特曼“窃取慈善机构”。

items.title_en: Trump claims planned attack on Iran postponed after Tehran makes new proposal to end war - The Guardian
items.title_zh: 特朗普声称在德黑兰提出结束战争的新建议后推迟了对伊朗的袭击计划 - 卫报
items.desc_en: Trump claims planned attack on Iran postponed after Tehran makes new proposal to end war  The GuardianIran says peace proposal includes reparations for war damage, US troop withdrawal  ReutersIran’s l
items.desc_zh: 特朗普声称在德黑兰提出结束战争的新提议后推迟了对伊朗的袭击计划《卫报》伊朗称和平提议包括战争损害赔偿和美国撤军路透社伊朗

items.title_en: Death toll from Israeli strikes on Lebanon passes 3,000, officials say
items.title_zh: 官员称，以色列对黎巴嫩的袭击造成的死亡人数已超过 3000 人
items.desc_en: It marks a grim milestone in the conflict between Israel and the Lebanese armed group Hezbollah since March, despite a nominal ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 尽管名义上停火，但这标志着以色列和黎巴嫩武装组织真主党自三月以来冲突中的一个严峻里程碑。

items.title_en: Two men arrested over stunt at enclosure of famous monkey Punch
items.title_zh: 两名男子因在著名猴子潘奇的圈地表演特技而被捕
items.desc_en: Two US nationals have been arrested after one jumped the fence of the monkey, who went viral online, police say.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，两名美国公民因跳下这只猴子的栅栏而被捕，这只猴子在网上疯传。

items.title_en: Shakira wins £50m tax refund from Spanish government
items.title_zh: 夏奇拉从西班牙政府获得 5000 万英镑退税
items.desc_en: The Colombian singer says the court ruling means the "narrative" that she was guilty now "crumbles".
items.desc_zh: 这位哥伦比亚歌手表示，法院的裁决意味着她有罪的“叙述”现在“崩溃”了。

items.title_en: Strike over high fuel prices paralyses transport in Kenya
items.title_zh: 高油价引发的罢工导致肯尼亚交通瘫痪
items.desc_en: Key roads have remained largely empty and some schools have asked students to stay at home.
items.desc_zh: 主要道路基本上仍然空无一人，一些学校要求学生呆在家里。

items.title_en: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
items.title_zh: 皇家天文台警告说，即时人工智能答案可能会削弱人类智能
items.desc_en: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.
items.desc_zh: 帕迪·罗杰斯表示，天文台丰富的历史表明了人类知识的力量以及避免“依赖”人工智能的必要性。

items.title_zh: AutoShelf
items.desc_en: Auto-organize files on your Mac
items.desc_zh: 自动整理 Mac 上的文件

items.desc_en: Find law firm revenue leaks, then fix them
items.desc_zh: 找到律师事务所的收入漏洞，然后修复它们

items.desc_zh: 以现代方式教授您的构建内容

items.desc_zh: 使用 AI 部署、调试和管理 Linux 服务器。

items.desc_en: Translate, save & memorize words while you read
items.desc_zh: 阅读时翻译、保存和记忆单词

items.title_en: Papr Graph

items.desc_en: Upgrade to graph-native vector embeddings
items.desc_zh: 升级到图原生向量嵌入

items.title_en: Lyricly
items.title_zh: Lyricly
items.desc_en: Live lyrics in your dynamic Notch & floating on your desktop
items.desc_zh: 动态 Notch 中的实时歌词并浮动在桌面上

items.title_en: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
items.title_zh: X 承诺对英国的仇恨和恐怖内容采取更快的行动
items.desc_en: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，在英国最近发生针对犹太社区的犯罪事件后，这些承诺尤为重要。

items.title_en: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: 索赔、反索赔和科技的肮脏一面暴露：我们在马斯克-奥特曼审判中学到的五件事
items.desc_en: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.
items.desc_zh: 正如陪审团审议的那样，这是我们在以两位科技巨头为核心的长达数周的审判中发现的结果。

items.title_en: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
items.title_zh: 走进兰花育种的秘密和利润丰厚的世界
items.desc_en: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.
items.desc_zh: 将新兰花推向市场可能需要十年的时间，因此育种者对其高科技流程保密。

items.title_en: AI could put people off tech jobs and hurt the economy, warns Raspberry Pi boss
items.title_zh: Raspberry Pi 老板警告说，人工智能可能会让人们失业并损害经济
items.desc_en: Eben Upton warns against claims that Artificial Intelligence will destroy vast numbers of computing roles over the coming years.
items.desc_zh: 埃本·厄普顿 (Eben Upton) 对人工智能将在未来几年摧毁大量计算角色的说法提出警告。

items.title_en: Buggyverse
items.title_zh: Buggyverse
items.desc_en: Study with strangers online, high-accountability focus rooms
items.desc_zh: 与陌生人在线学习，高度负责的焦点室

items.title_en: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
items.title_zh: 通过在难民系统中更换 Palantir 技术节省了“数百万英镑”
items.desc_en: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，其内部IT系统“更加灵活”，同时满足“高标准”的安全性。

items.title_en: HMRC to use AI from British tech firm to spot fraud and tax return errors
items.title_zh: 英国税务海关总署将使用英国科技公司的人工智能来发现欺诈和纳税申报错误
items.desc_en: Quantexa, a financial data platform, won the £175m contract to spot fraud and tax return errors.
items.desc_zh: 金融数据平台 Quantexa 赢得了价值 1.75 亿英镑的合同，以发现欺诈和纳税申报错误。

items.title_en: Drizz
items.title_zh: Drizz
items.desc_en: Mobile tests that write, run, and fix themselves
items.desc_zh: 自行编写、运行和修复的移动测试

items.title_en: Voker
items.title_zh: Voker
items.desc_en: The Agent Analytics Platform for AI Product Teams
items.desc_zh: 人工智能产品团队的代理分析平台

items.title_en: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
items.title_zh: WhatsApp 与其人工智能聊天机器人推出完全私密的“隐身”对话
items.desc_en: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.
items.desc_zh: 一位网络安全专家表示，如果出现问题，删除聊天记录可能会导致缺乏责任感。

items.title_en: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads
items.title_zh: 数千辆 Waymo 机器人出租车因存在进入被洪水淹没的道路的风险而被召回
items.desc_en: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.
items.desc_zh: 此次自愿召回是在 4 月 20 日发生的一起事件之后发生的，当时一辆空的 Waymo 汽车进入德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥市一条被洪水淹没的道路。

items.desc_zh: 摇摇欲坠的道路和其他危险——人工智能能让我们的街道更安全吗？
